title: angelica ternata
intro: Angelica ternata, also known as three-flowered angelica or Yomogi, is a plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae) native to East Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used in medicine and cooking due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Angelica ternata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and dried roots, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
